description: 参与评估的作战力量的战损情况

queries.label: 战损明细
queries.sql: SELECT unit_name, equipment_type, loss_count, loss_reason, report_time FROM combat_loss ORDER BY report_time DESC LIMIT 50

description: 本次作战打击效果与战果

queries.label: 战果汇总
queries.sql: SELECT unit_name, SUM(hit_count) as total_hits, SUM(destroy_count) as total_destroys FROM combat_result GROUP BY unit_name ORDER BY total_hits DESC

description: 作战过程中的弹药/燃料/物资消耗

queries.label: 消耗明细
queries.sql: SELECT resource_type, SUM(amount) as total_amount, unit FROM resource_consume GROUP BY resource_type, unit
